name: computer-use-win
description: Control Windows desktop apps from Codex through Computer Use for Windows powered by Okno.

interface.shortDescription: Control Windows apps from Codex through Okno
interface.longDescription: Computer Use for Windows is a Codex-native Windows desktop control plugin powered by the Okno engine. It provides a quiet operator surface for observing app state, clicking within app windows, and iterating through GUI tasks without exposing the low-level Windows engine tools as the main product UX.
defaultPrompt: Use Computer Use for Windows to inspect the target Windows app.
Get the current app state and click through the GUI step by step.
